honest_claim: ballpark-consistent template-free chirp mass (~20-30% systematic from frequency quantization + window smearing in an accelerating sweep); the raw -3..+6% agreement is partly fortuitous and NOT precision
negative_result: band-resolved Mc infeasible via ridge: heavy events sweep upper bands faster than STFT resolution (<25 ms for 64-200 Hz); light events too faint per-slice. Matches E73's anatomy compression. Real version needs band-limited Bayesian PE.
